case_title: LAZARTE, INEZ VS ESCOBAR, ENRIQUE DBA ESCOBAR BROS. CUSTOM TAILORS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LAZARTE, INEZ AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, ENRIQUE DBA ESCOBAR BROS. CUSTOM TAILORS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, ENRIQUE DBA ESCOBAR BROS. CUSTOM TAILORS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-30-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-05-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAZARTE, INEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, ENRIQUE DBA ESCOBAR BROS. CUSTOM TAILORS $4,060.50 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,110.50, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF LAZARTE IS ENTITLED TO $9952.50 PLUS ALLOWANCE OF $108 FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES PURSUANT TO THE SUBJECT SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR $6,000.00 PREVIOUSLY PAID. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CONTINUANCE REQUEST BY DEFENDANT. ($10.00 FEE PAID) COMMISSIONER TO SIGN ORDER.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO THE PLTF, LAZARTE, INEZ RETURNED UNDELIVERED. NO ADDRESS.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, ENRIQUE DBA ESCOBAR BROS. CUSTOM TAILORS
